title: Drift Failure Detected — agt-fx-posttrade-001
description: During evaluation of agent 'agt-fx-posttrade-001', ThirdLine detected 1 interaction(s) that failed the drift evaluation dimension. This constitutes a failure of control CTRL-003 — AI Model Drift Detection and Response, which requires adherence to the 'Ongoing Monitoring and Performance Stability' principle. The average evaluation score for this dimension was 0.00 (threshold: 0.80). The most significant failure had a score of 0.00. Specific evidence: Drift evaluation: PSI = 12.1668 (threshold: 0.2). Early window avg output length: 472 chars. Late window avg output length: 338 chars. Quality drop: 28.5%. FAIL — significant distribution shift detected after index 30.. This finding requires review by a human auditor before finalisation.
evidence_summary: 1 of 1 interactions failed the drift evaluation. Average score: 0.00. Minimum score: 0.00.
recommended_action: 1. Identify the drift start point (which interaction index quality changed). 2. Analyse input distribution changes that correlate with the drift point. 3. Determine if the agent needs re-prompting, retraining, or scope restriction. 4. Implement input distribution monitoring in production. 5. Set automated re-evaluation triggers when PSI exceeds 0.10.
